title: Section 1-1-4.1 Oberservation of Daylight Saving Time Year-Round Upon Act by United States Congress.
text: If the United States Congress amends 15 U.S.C. § 260a to authorize states to observe Daylight Saving Time year-round, the State of Alabama shall adopt Daylight Saving Time as the year-round standard of time for the entire state and all of its political subdivisions.
